source.description: A reviewed six-panel pencil-and-colored-pencil process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent three-quarter vintage leather suitcase on warm off-white paper, with a blank luggage tag and no logos, lettering, destination stickers, or surrounding travel scene.

process_strategy: The sequence fixes one shallow three-quarter box, rounds it into a leather case, builds only visible handle, strap, corner, and latch geometry, adds a blank hanging tag and seams, then introduces restrained leather color and shadow before final cleanup only.

final_elements.name: three-quarter suitcase box, center guides, and handle anchors
final_elements.description: A light shallow box with receding top and side planes fixes the case perspective while two anchor marks reserve the handle.

final_elements.name: rounded leather case silhouette, lid seam, and corner caps
final_elements.description: Softened corners, a visible lid seam, and six visible reinforced corner caps turn the box into one old travel case.

final_elements.name: arched handle, two leather straps, and two latch plates
final_elements.description: A centered handle and two vertical straps align with paired latch plates on the established front plane.

final_elements.name: blank luggage tag, buckle details, stitching, and leather creases
final_elements.description: A small blank tag hangs from the handle while restrained buckle, stitch, and crease marks describe age without adding text.

final_elements.name: warm brown leather, ochre hardware, graphite wear, and ground shadow
final_elements.description: Warm brown and ochre pencil tint the already drawn case and hardware while soft graphite wear and shadow keep the finish handmade.

frames.visible_job: Places a light shallow three-quarter box, center guides, and two handle anchors at one fixed scale.
introduces: three-quarter suitcase box, center guides, and handle anchors

frames.visible_job: Softens the case corners, draws the lid seam, and adds six visible reinforced corner caps without changing the perspective.
introduces: rounded leather case silhouette, lid seam, and corner caps
requires_prior_elements: three-quarter suitcase box, center guides, and handle anchors

frames.visible_job: Adds the arched handle, two leather straps, and two aligned latch plates to the established case planes.
introduces: arched handle, two leather straps, and two latch plates
requires_prior_elements: three-quarter suitcase box, center guides, and handle anchors
rounded leather case silhouette, lid seam, and corner caps

frames.visible_job: Hangs one blank luggage tag from the handle and adds buckle, stitch, and leather-crease details to existing forms.
introduces: blank luggage tag, buckle details, stitching, and leather creases
requires_prior_elements: rounded leather case silhouette, lid seam, and corner caps
arched handle, two leather straps, and two latch plates

frames.visible_job: Adds warm brown leather color, ochre hardware, restrained graphite wear, and a soft ground shadow to established shapes.
introduces: warm brown leather, ochre hardware, graphite wear, and ground shadow
requires_prior_elements: rounded leather case silhouette, lid seam, and corner caps
arched handle, two leather straps, and two latch plates
blank luggage tag, buckle details, stitching, and leather creases

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established shell, seam, handle, straps, hardware, blank tag, leather color, wear, and shadow.

rejection_checks: No case plane, seam, handle, strap, latch, corner cap, tag, stitch, color area, wear mark, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The suitcase must retain one shallow three-quarter angle, scale, crop, and hardware alignment across all six panels.
Do not render hidden strap or tag detail beneath opaque overlapping pieces.
Reject logos, readable text, destination stickers, passports, clothing, extra luggage, room scenes, or decorative borders.
The finish must read as a warm handmade pencil study rather than glossy product illustration or vector luggage icon.
